Reference 2 = the ANATOMY to embed (glowing anatomical BRAIN at the top of the head, a luminous DNA double-helix down the center of the body, translucent botanical LEAVES and leaf-vein/nerve networks woven through the body). CREATE one single FULL-BODY, FRONT-FACING FEMININE figure (graceful slender feminine silhouette, head to feet, standing, facing camera, arms relaxed at her sides) that has reference 1's soft warm ethereal smoky glow and tan dreamy backdrop WITH reference 2's brain, DNA helix and botanical vein networks glowing inside the translucent body. Warm golden-tan palette, soft and ethereal, glow gently bleeding into the warm background. No text, no logos. Centered full-body 1:1 square composition.
